creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
# cd /usr/ports/audio/bmp-crossfade && make
<--snip-->
checking for xmms... no
checking for xmms-config... no
checking for audacious2... no
checking for pkg-config... /usr/local/bin/pkg-config
checking for noxmms... no
checking for noxmms-config... no
configure: error: *** no player selected, use --enable-player=xmms|audacious
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

It looks like bmp support was dropped from later versions which is why the 
PORTVERSION for the bmp plugin is behind.
--

KDE/FreeBSD Team
